title: Coruscant News Network
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Coruscant News Network''', also known as the '''Coruscant News Net''', was a news agency in the later days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and in the age of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. It was the premier source for news on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

Some [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Caamas]], Coruscant News Network [[Journalist/Legends|journalists]] [[Peacekeeping mission to the Sepan sector|accompanied]] [[Gar Stazi]] and a [[Unidentified Tynnan diplomat|Tynnan]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] on [[Kuthard]]. They asked an old [[Dimok (people)|Dimok]] [[Unidentified Dimok crone|matriarch]] about the [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] lasting [[Sepan Civil War|conflict]] with the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]].

==Behind the scenes==
This is most likely a reference to the real world [[Wikipedia:CNN|Cable News Network]], as the companies share a common acronym: ''CNN''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
